findings.title: Critical Performance Regression in Dashboard Load Time
findings.description: The recent deployment of v3.2 has caused a significant regression in dashboard load times due to unoptimized SVG rendering in the new charting library. This impacts user experience and could lead to customer dissatisfaction.
assumptions: The regression in load time is directly linked to the new charting library implementation.

evidence.excerpt: The dashboard load time has regressed significantly from 1.2s to 4.8s after the v3.2 deployment.

recommendations: Optimize SVG rendering in the new charting library to improve load times.

metadata.mitigation: Optimize SVG rendering in the new charting library.

findings.title: Critical Regression in Core Metrics
findings.description: The recent regression in core page load metrics indicates a significant risk to PageSpeed's performance reputation. This could lead to customer dissatisfaction and attrition if not addressed promptly.
assumptions: Core metrics are essential for maintaining customer trust and satisfaction.

evidence.excerpt: The recent regression in core page load metrics indicates a significant risk to PageSpeed's performance reputation.

recommendations: Address the regression in core metrics immediately to restore customer confidence.

metadata.mitigation: Address the regression in core metrics immediately.

findings.title: Memory Leak in WebSocket Connections
findings.description: There is a memory leak in the WebSocket connections that leads to out-of-memory (OOM) crashes. This affects real-time monitoring capabilities and needs urgent attention.
assumptions: The memory leak is causing significant performance issues.

evidence.excerpt: A memory leak in WebSocket connections leads to server crashes, affecting real-time monitoring capabilities.

recommendations: Fix the memory leak in WebSocket connections to prevent server crashes.

metadata.mitigation: Fix the memory leak in WebSocket connections.

findings.title: Lack of Automated Performance Regression Detection
findings.description: Currently, there is no automated performance regression detection in the CI pipeline, which could prevent future regressions.
assumptions: Automated detection is essential for maintaining performance standards.

evidence.excerpt: There is a strong need for automated performance regression detection in the CI pipeline.

recommendations: Implement automated performance regression detection in the CI pipeline.

findings.title: Accessibility Compliance Review Needed
findings.description: A review of the dashboard and status page for accessibility compliance is required to ensure adherence to WCAG standards.
assumptions: Accessibility compliance is essential for user inclusivity.

evidence.excerpt: Conduct a review of the dashboard and status page for accessibility compliance.

recommendations: Conduct a thorough accessibility compliance review.

metadata.mitigation: Conduct a thorough accessibility compliance review.
metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

summary: Identified 5 risks (1 accessibility, 4 performance). 3 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (3 blockers, 0 warnings).
